expectations.text: preserves TR-01 through TR-07 numbering exactly (no renumbering)
expectations.evidence: Output file shows TR-01..TR-07 unchanged in identity and order; new TRs appended starting at TR-08.

expectations.text: flags the broken-source TR (TR-06) with a ⚠️ marker rather than deleting it
expectations.evidence: '> ⚠️ source no longer resolves — human review.' present on TR-06; TR text retained.

expectations.text: appends new requirements at TR-08 or higher (does not reuse numbers)
expectations.evidence: TR-08, TR-09, TR-10, TR-11 appended for newly-discovered requirements (reproducibility, identity, succession, packaging).

expectations.text: nulls out reviewed_at (or surfaces that the user must re-set it)
expectations.evidence: Frontmatter is 'reviewed_at: null'; response says 'I won't propose ADRs (Stage 2) until you've reviewed the re-extracted requirements'.

expectations.text: mentions git diff as the review surface for the changes
expectations.evidence: Lists what changed in prose but does not explicitly mention git diff as the review mechanism.

expectations.text: actually reads the existing tech-requirements.md before re-extracting (rather than rewriting from scratch)
expectations.evidence: TR-01..TR-07 text is byte-for-byte preserved; agent confirms 'I re-read the capability doc and all seven UX docs'.
